translator_credits.name: Initial author review
translator_credits.note: Translations reviewed for idiomatic usage by an L1 Yoruba speaker. Community contributions welcome via the standard ACP process.

aaep:agent.session.started.summary_detailed: Mò ń bẹ̀rẹ̀ iṣẹ́ tó béèrè nípa: {request_text}
aaep:agent.session.started.notes: Greeting at session start. Tone marks on ẹ̀ and ẹ́ encode meaning.

aaep:agent.session.completed.summary_detailed: Mo parí iṣẹ́ náà ní ìṣẹ́jú àáyá {duration_ms}. Mo lo ohun-èlò {tool_invocations_count}.
aaep:agent.session.completed.notes: Past-tense completion. 'Ó parí' is most natural way to say 'it is done'.

aaep:agent.session.errored.summary_normal: Iṣẹ́ náà kò ṣe é ṣe nítorí àṣìṣe
aaep:agent.session.errored.summary_detailed: Iṣẹ́ náà kò ṣe é ṣe nítorí: {error_message}. Ṣe é le ṣe síi sí? {recoverable}
aaep:agent.session.errored.notes: 'Àṣìṣe' is the standard term for error/mistake.

aaep:agent.session.cancelled.notes: Passive construction common in Yoruba for cancellations.

aaep:agent.progress.updated.summary_normal: Mo ti parí ìdá {progress_percent} nínú ọgọ́rùn-ún
aaep:agent.progress.updated.summary_detailed: Mo ti parí ìdá {progress_percent} nínú ọgọ́rùn-ún. {progress_message}
aaep:agent.progress.updated.notes: Yoruba expresses percent as 'parts of a hundred' (ọgọ́rùn-ún).

aaep:agent.tool.invoked.summary_detailed: Mò ń lo ohun-èlò {tool} pẹ̀lú àwọn àlàyé: {args_summary}

aaep:agent.output.streaming.notes: Streaming events use empty summaries; chunk content is the speech. Match core spec.

aaep:agent.awaiting.confirmation.summary_detailed: Mò ń béèrè ìfọwọ́sí rẹ kí n tó ṣe {action}. Wọ́ọ̀, kí ni ìpadàbọ̀ rẹ̀: {consequence}
aaep:agent.awaiting.confirmation.notes: 'Ṣé kí n ṣe X?' = 'should I do X?' — conventional Yoruba way to ask permission.

aaep:agent.awaiting.clarification.notes: Pass through the question text directly; preamble adds context.

aaep:agent.handoff.requested.summary_normal: Mo ní láti fún ẹlòmíì níṣẹ́ nítorí {reason}
aaep:agent.handoff.requested.summary_detailed: Mo ní láti fún {handoff_target} níṣẹ́ nítorí: {reason}
aaep:agent.handoff.requested.notes: Handoff = passing the task to another agent/human; literally 'give-someone-task'.
